controls.title: Local educational safety scope is explicit
controls.description: The lab must remain local, controlled, non-destructive and educational.

controls.title: DREPS evidence pack is generated
controls.description: The lab must produce a valid evidence-pack.json consumable by Doctrine Platform.

controls.title: Artifacts are hashed
controls.description: Every exported artifact must be referenced with a SHA-256 digest.

controls.title: Premium Doctrine features remain out of scope
controls.description: The public lab must not claim official Doctrine certification, enterprise scoring, keyless signing or WORM archive enforcement.
